race.comment: One for the babies. Connections had such a high opinion of SHEZA BOOM (5) that they entered her in two Listed races to start her career. Wasn't disgraced on both occasions before not being too far away in town before the spell. Has since been given time to furnish and only needs some luck navigating from the sticky draw to be playing a major role in the outcome. CALISTO COMET (1) is facing the starter for the first time but has shown ability at the trials and draws favourably from the inside alley. Respect any market support. RAGING RAIDER (9) resumes here but showed enough in her first campaign to warrant consideration in a race like this. Include in calculations. METAL BOSS (3) was thereabouts on debut and will have derived a stack of benefit from that race day experience. In the mix. QUICK RELEASE (4) is at the races for the first time but is sure to be well-educated from the Hoysted barn. Keep safe.
